title: sesleria sphaerocephala var. coerulescens
intro: Sesleria sphaerocephala var. coerulescens, also known as Blue Moor-grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as having antioxidant and antifungal properties. The herbal preparations of Sesleria sphaerocephala var. coerulescens include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
